notes: Solid, feature-complete Asteroids implementation with UFO, wave progression, particle effects, audio, high score persistence, and proper toroidal wrapping; minor issue is UFO only patrols a narrow vertical band (y 70-260) and the respawn overlay text during active play is slightly intrusive, but overall a high-quality build.
A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with proper waves, splitting rocks, UFO, pause and respawn logic, but it is not flawless due to some rough edges in authenticity and game-state polish.
